user.title: Finish HomeWakeWord setup
user.description:
HomeWakeWord installed from HACS is only a helper integration.

1. Install and start the HomeWakeWord add-on separately.
2. Add Home Assistant's built-in Wyoming integration.
3. Connect it to host `{wyoming_host}` and port `{wyoming_port}`.

This integration does not install, manage, or proxy the add-on runtime.

init.title: HomeWakeWord options
init.description: Update the add-on name shown in onboarding help and the Wyoming host/port shown to the user.
